case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK, FSB VS. DANE PEDERSON et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-26-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-26-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
